summary: P1.8-10: Home inbound highlight closes Decisions Anticipation → Reward return path via useHomeJourneyHighlight — auto-switches Báo cáo tab, scrolls metric tile or Shop Health bar, 2s pulse ring; reduced-motion scroll-only; invalid params ignored.

interfaceChanges.description: Client hook parsing Home ?highlight=domain:metric for tab switch, scroll, and pulse ring.

mappings.criterion: highlight revenue_growth revenue_7d selects Tăng trưởng tab and highlights Doanh thu 7 ngày tile
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue219_home_inbound_highlight.test.tsx::selects Tăng trưởng tab and highlights Doanh thu 7 ngày for revenue_growth:revenue_7d

mappings.criterion: highlight revenue_growth roas selects Tăng trưởng tab and highlights ROAS tile
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue219_home_inbound_highlight.test.tsx::selects Tăng trưởng tab and highlights ROAS for revenue_growth:roas

mappings.criterion: highlight inventory_refunds refund_rate_7d selects Tồn kho tab and highlights refund rate tile
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue219_home_inbound_highlight.test.tsx::selects Tồn kho & Hoàn tiền and highlights refund rate for inventory_refunds:refund_rate_7d

mappings.criterion: highlight shop_health ahr scrolls to AHR bar on new-seller persona
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue219_home_inbound_highlight.test.tsx::scrolls to AHR bar for shop_health:ahr on new-seller persona
web/src/__tests__/test_issue219_home_inbound_highlight.test.tsx::scrolls without pulse when prefers-reduced-motion is reduce

mappings.criterion: Home read-only gate unchanged no approve CTAs
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue219_home_inbound_highlight.test.tsx::keeps Home read-only — no approve CTAs when highlight param is present

mappings.criterion: Decisions Anticipation link Home lands correct tab data-highlighted
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue219_home_inbound_highlight.test.tsx::lands on correct Home tab with data-highlighted from clarity card home link
